subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself through the Sun of Will upon the Kingdom of inner meanings and utterance when the allegorical meanings were unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی بشمس الاراده علی ملکوت المعانی و البیان اذا ظهر التوریه
subcodes.subjects: @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @procession; appearance of the Word from God, @the power of words; of speech, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
